test_cases.title: Sync echo returns output with exitCode 0
test_cases.description: AC-1: Execute 'echo hello world', verify output contains 'hello world' and exitCode 0
steps: Start Pi session with bash-async extension loaded

test_cases.title: Sync exit 1 throws Error with exit code
test_cases.description: AC-13: Execute 'exit 1', verify Error thrown with 'exited with code 1'
steps: Verify Error message contains 'exited with code 1'

test_cases.title: Sync timeout detach returns jobId with running process
test_cases.description: AC-2: Execute 'sleep 200' with defaultTimeout=3, verify detach after 3s with process still alive
steps: Run 'ps aux | grep sleep' to confirm process is alive

test_cases.title: Sync with explicit timeout detaches at correct time
test_cases.description: AC-3: Execute 'sleep 200' with timeout=5, verify detach after 5s
steps: Verify process still alive via 'ps aux | grep sleep'

test_cases.title: Sync no timeout waits for completion
test_cases.description: AC-4: With defaultTimeout=0, execute 'sleep 3', verify normal completion

test_cases.title: Sync AbortSignal kills process
test_cases.description: AC-5: Execute 'sleep 100', send abort signal, verify process killed

test_cases.title: Background mode returns jobId immediately
test_cases.description: AC-6: Execute 'echo done' with background=true, verify immediate return and followUp injection

test_cases.title: Poll returns running then done status
test_cases.description: AC-7: Start background 'sleep 3', poll immediately (running), wait, poll again (done)

test_cases.title: Kill terminates running job
test_cases.description: AC-8: Start background 'sleep 100', kill it, verify process dead
steps: Verify response contains output (may be empty)
Verify process no longer in 'ps aux'

test_cases.title: Poll/kill nonexistent jobId returns error
test_cases.description: AC-9: Poll and kill with fake jobId, verify isError

test_cases.title: Session shutdown kills all running jobs
test_cases.description: AC-10: Create jobs in session A, verify invisible in session B, verify cleanup on shutdown
steps: Session B: poll those jobIds → verify 'not found'
Run 'ps aux | grep sleep' → verify no orphaned processes

test_cases.title: Config file defaults and overrides
test_cases.description: AC-11: Test missing config, invalid JSON, valid config
steps: Write invalid JSON to config → verify defaults used
Write { defaultTimeout: 5, maxBackgroundJobs: 3 } → verify values applied

test_cases.title: Spawn failure returns isError
test_cases.description: AC-12: Execute nonexistent command, verify isError with ENOENT
steps: Verify error message mentions command not found

test_cases.title: Output truncation at 2000 lines
test_cases.description: AC-14: Execute command producing 3000 lines, verify truncation
steps: Execute: command='for i in $(seq 1 3000); do echo line_$i; done'
Verify output is truncated (less than 3000 lines)
Verify truncation notice includes 'Showing lines' text
Verify temp file path is provided

test_cases.title: Max background jobs limit enforced
test_cases.description: AC-15: Start maxBackgroundJobs jobs, verify next one fails
steps: Attempt 4th background job → verify error about max concurrent

test_cases.title: Cwd validation rejects nonexistent directory
test_cases.description: AC-16: Execute command with non-existent cwd
steps: Verify Error thrown with 'Working directory does not exist'

test_cases.title: Shell discovery uses correct shell
test_cases.description: AC-17: Verify bash/sh is used, commandPrefix injected
steps: Execute: command='echo $0' → verify shows bash or sh
Execute command that relies on prefix → verify prefix applied
